import os,re
root='.'
classes=[]
for dirpath,_,files in os.walk(root):
  if '/target/' in dirpath or '/.git' in dirpath: continue
  for f in files:
    if f.endswith('.java'):
      p=os.path.join(dirpath,f)
      txt=open(p,encoding='utf-8',errors='ignore').read()
      # strip comments rough
      s=re.sub(r'/\\*.*?\\*/','',txt,flags=re.S)
      s=re.sub(r'//.*','',s)
      for m in re.finditer(r'(?:(?:public|protected|private|static|abstract|final|strictfp)\\s+)*(?:class|interface|enum)\\s+(\\w+)\\b(["'^'"\\{;]*)',s):
        name=m.group(1); tail=m.group(2)
        ext=None
        em=re.search(r'extends\\s+([\\w.]+)',tail)
        if em: ext=em.group(1).split('.')[-1]
        impl=[]
        im=re.search(r'implements\\s+(["'^'"\\{]+)',tail)
        if im: impl=[x.strip().split('<')[0].split('.')[-1] for x in im.group(1).split(',')]
        classes.append((p[2:],name,ext,impl))
# closure subclasses of JsonSerializer
sup={name:ext for _,name,ext,_ in classes}
impls={name:impl for _,name,_,impl in classes}
js=set(['JsonSerializer'])
changed=True
while changed:
  changed=False
  for _,name,ext,impl in classes:
    if name not in js and (ext in js):
      js.add(name); changed=True
print('classes',len(classes),'jsonserializer subclasses',len(js))
for p,n,e,i in classes:
  if n in js:
    print(p,n,'extends',e)
PY"
